title: PDF Summary
description: Extract text from PDF and generate concise key-point summary plus keyword list (fully client-side, no upload)

upload.drop: Drop a PDF here, or click to select
upload.limit: Up to 50MB, single file, fully local parsing

result.empty: Upload a PDF and click Generate

errors.emptyText: No readable text extracted (PDF may be scan-based)

tips.title: Tips
items: Fully client-side — your file never leaves your browser
Scanned PDFs have no text layer; OCR them first
Summary uses keyword frequency + sentence position heuristics; no external AI calls
